title: Formula One team deploys Aussie AI for a technical edge

title: Musk accuses Anthropic CEO of 'projecting' over AI consciousness concerns
description: SpaceX and Tesla CEO Elon Musk accused the head of Anthropic, an artificial intelligence company that is at odds with the Pentagon over its use, of "projecting" this week.
content:

title: Oracle and OpenAI drop Texas data center expansion plan
description: ORACLE and OpenAI have abandoned plans to expand a flagship artificial intelligence (AI) data center in Texas after negotiations dragged over financing and OpenAI’s changing needs, Bloomberg News reported on Friday, citing people familiar with the matter.

title: Helping young professionals become indispensable in the AI-driven labor market
description: AS companies increasingly integrate artificial intelligence (AI) into their operations, a critical question emerges: Are we — as a society that includes employers, educators, policymakers and technology providers — preparing young people for a workplace where essential AI skills will very soon become the norm while many traditional entry-level tasks may soon be automated? To achieve this goal, our collective efforts need to address three fundamental challenges.

title: AI-Driven MarTech: How Artificial Intelligence Is Reshaping Marketing Technology
description: Every major wave of change in marketing technology has been driven by a shift in the underlying capability of software. Email made mass personalised communication possible.
